[@microsoft/fast-element](../fast-element/index.html) &gt; [ElementController](../fast-element.elementcontroller/index.html) &gt; [unsubscribe](../fast-element.elementcontroller.unsubscribe/index.html)

## ElementController.unsubscribe() method

Unsubscribes from notification of changes in the element's state.

**Signature:**

```typescript
unsubscribe(subscriber: Subscriber, propertyToUnwatch?: any): void;
```

## Parameters

</th><th>

</th></tr></thead>

</td><td>

The object that is unsubscribing from change notification.


</td></tr>

</td><td>

</td><td>

_(Optional)_ The name of the property to unsubscribe from.


</td></tr>
